prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低录取位次分别为约48名、37名、60名、1138名（2024年因专业组细分出现异常低位）、63名。2024年位次异常主要受新高考专业组细分影响，2025年已回归至63名，近两年基准位次稳定在60–63名区间；该校在广西理科组招生计划：2021年14人、2022年14人、2023年14人、2024年14人、2025年18人；2026年计划21人，较2025年扩招3人（增幅约16.7%），扩招幅度较大，有助于缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖学府，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（主要涉及校园安全、宿舍管理等问题），但抖音综合热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量极高，表明社会关注度不减；2025年声誉偏负面（招生空档、舆情事件），但未出现系统性断档信号；北京大学拥有A+学科30余个，涵盖数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、经济学、中国语言文学等，与招生专业高度匹配，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐；广西2026年高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年增加约1.2万人，物理类考生预计增加约6000人（增幅约2.3%），竞争略有加剧；省控线（物理类本科批370–371分）基本稳定；北京大学位于北京，广西属跨省报考，无本地招生倾斜；该校在广西招生占比极小（约0.01%），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次63名、2026年扩招3人（约16.7%）使竞争缓解、广西物理类考生增加约2.3%使竞争略加剧、学校顶尖声誉与高热关注度维持强劲吸引力，扩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约66名，区间59–73名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（59–73名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如59名以内）可重点冲刺元培、计算机等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（73名附近）应以二档工科试验班、电子信息类为主，三档化学类、生物科学类作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 48, 37, 60, 1138 (2024 saw an abnormal low due to major group subdivision), and 63. The 2024 ranking anomaly was mainly due to the new college entrance examination major group subdivision, and in 2025 it returned to 63, with the baseline ranking stabilizing in the 60–63 range in recent years; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi science group: 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 18 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 21, an increase of 3 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 16.7%), a relatively large expansion that helps alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; in 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (mainly involving campus safety, dormitory management, etc.), but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, indicating undiminished social attention; in 2025, the reputation was somewhat negative (admission gaps, public opinion incidents), but no systematic gap signals appeared; Peking University has more than 30 A+ disciplines, covering mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, computer science and technology, law, economics, Chinese language and literature, etc., highly matching the admission majors, with top national disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly recommended; the total number of Guangxi college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 compared to 2025, with physics category candidates expected to increase by about 6,000 (an increase of about 2.3%), slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line (physics category undergraduate batch 370–371 points) is basically stable; Peking University is located in Beijing, and Guangxi is a cross-province application, with no local admission preference; the university's admission proportion in Guangxi is extremely small (about 0.01%), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 63, the 2026 expansion of 3 students (about 16.7%) easing competition, the increase of about 2.3% in Guangxi physics category candidates slightly intensifying competition, and the university's top reputation and high popularity maintaining strong appeal, the expansion effect is slightly greater than the candidate increase effect. The minimum admission ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 66, in the range of 59–73.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (59–73), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 59), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Yuanpei and Computer Science; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 73), you should mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Engineering Experimental Class and Electronic Information, with Tier 3 majors like Chemistry and Biological Sciences as stable options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 22nd, 19th, 2023, 239th (abnormally low in 2024 due to major group subdivision), and 21st. The abnormal ranking in 2024 was mainly affected by the subdivision of major groups under the new college entrance examination, and it returned to 21st in 2025, with the baseline ranking stabilizing in the 19–22 range in recent two years. The enrollment plan for liberal arts groups in Guangxi: 15 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 16 in 2024, 15 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 15, same as 2025, with stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it a top national institution with strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (mainly involving campus safety, dormitory management, etc.), but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, indicating sustained social attention. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (enrollment gaps, public opinion incidents), but no systematic signal of a gap appeared. Peking University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts, with A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, A+ in Law, A+ in Sociology, A+ in Economics, A+ in Business Administration, A- in Journalism and Communication, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are recommended as hot. The total number of Guangxi college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 392,000, with history category candidates expected to increase by about 6,300 (an increase of about 5.3%), intensifying competition. The provincial control line (history category undergraduate batch 400–402 points) is basically stable. Peking University is located in Beijing, and Guangxi is a cross-province application, with no local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is extremely small, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 21st in 2025, the enrollment plan unchanged in 2026, the increase of about 5.3% in Guangxi history category candidates intensifying competition, and the top reputation and high attention maintaining strong appeal, with the plan unchanged and candidates increasing, the minimum admission ranking is expected to move slightly forward (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 18th, range 15–21.
